state.next-action: The heavy-blob history cleanup is done and `main` pushes again. The shared provider contract is landed, `@portfolio/repub-builder` builds from the vendored standalone repo, hosted book-artifact and public-media publishers are live, and `/apps` now reads from seeded Supabase-backed `site-app-records` through an SSR-safe worker boundary. Next, continue `global-data-03-01` by wiring the first real `site-download-assets` consumers for public planning-pack bundles and resume/download artifacts, then continue `global-data-03-02` and `global-data-03-03` for project and resume metadata, followed by the owner-only shell refresh in `global-auth-02`.

agent-id-policy.rule: Optional: register a unique id in STATE.xml before claiming tasks if you use CLI task-update.
